description: Legal document mentioning names such as Yaʿaqov, Abraham, [...] b. Yefet, Yaḥyā b. [...], [...] b. Ḥalfon b. [...], Ṣedaqa b. Yosef, 80 dinars, a monthly payment of 10 zuzim from the writer to the addressee, and the refusal of someone to appoint an agent. Dated at the end, ‘all this happened on Monday 24th Shevat 1404 of the Seleucid Era’ (= 1093 CE). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
